name: How can I save money on a bathroom remodel without making it look cheap?

mainEntity.name: How can I save money on a bathroom remodel without making it look cheap?

acceptedAnswer.text: You can often cut costs by keeping the existing layout, choosing standard-size fixtures, and limiting custom tile work. Reusing a good vanity or mirror may also save money, as long as it fits the new design. The biggest savings usually come from reducing plumbing moves and avoiding last-minute design changes.
acceptedAnswer.description: Keep the layout, use standard fixtures, and limit custom work. The biggest savings usually come from avoiding plumbing changes and design changes mid-project.

description: Keep the layout, use standard fixtures, and limit custom work. The biggest savings usually come from avoiding plumbing changes and design changes mid-project.
